zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Mathilde von Vohburg於1034年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆沃賀包格 安 德 堂瑙時，她的父親Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau30歲，母親Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt28歲。她和Friedrich I von Tengling至少有2個兒子。她去世於1125年9月30日在奧地利薩特茲包格薩特茲包格 武姆格布多享年91歲。

nameMeanings.name: Vohburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vosberg
meanings: North German: topographic name from vos(sen)berg ‘fox-hole’. Compare Vosburg , Vosburgh , and Vossberg .

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Mathilde von Vohburg was born in 1034, in Vohburg an der Donau, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, was 30 and her mother, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, was 28. She had at least 2 sons with Friedrich I von Tengling. She died on 30 September 1125, in Dorfbeuern, Salzburg Umgebung, Salzburg, Austria, at the age of 91.

Graf im Augstgau, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Friedrich I von Tengling. Elle est décédée le 30 septembre 1125, à Dorfbeuern, Salzburg Umgebung, Salzburg, Autriche, à l’âge de 91 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Mathilde von Vohburg è nata il nel 1034 nel Vohburg an der Donau, Landkreis Pfaffenhofen an der Ilm, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Diepold I. Graf im Augstgau, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Maria Dorothea von Schweinfurt, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Friedrich I von Tengling. Morì il 30 settembre 1125, nel Dorfbeuern, Salzburg Umgebung, Salzburg, Austria, all'età di 91 anni.

Она умерла 30 сентября 1125 г. в местности дорфбеуирн, салзбург умгебунг, салзбург, Австрия в возрасте 91 год.
